aeo_readiness.summary: Jade Air has a basic level of AEO readiness with some critical areas for improvement. The website has relevant content and schema markup but lacks comprehensive optimization for AI search visibility.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build Google reviews and improve local SEO.
Optimize meta tags and headings with targeted keywords related to AC and HVAC services in Dallas.
Enhance the website's internal linking structure to improve crawlability and user navigation.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has a clear business description and contact information but lacks detailed service pages and location-specific content.
gbp_analysis.summary: Jade Air's website provides a general overview of services but lacks depth in content and geographic targeting, which are essential for Google Business Profile optimization.
critical_issues: No dedicated service pages with detailed information and targeted keywords.
Lack of location-specific content to target local search queries.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone) information on the website but lacks citations across major directories and local listings.
action_items: Create and verify a Google Business Profile with accurate NAP information.
List the business on relevant local directories such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and local chamber of commerce websites.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and citations.

schema_gaps: No Organization schema for business details.
Missing Service schema for detailed service offerings.
No LocalBusiness schema with geographic markup.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of comprehensive content and structured data to support AI-driven search queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: AI search algorithms due to insufficient content depth and structured data.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement FAQ schema and expand service pages with detailed information and FAQs.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Develop a blog section with informative articles on HVAC maintenance, energy efficiency, and local weather-related topics to establish authority and improve search visibility.

page_title: Jade Air | Home Air Conditioning Repair & Service | Dallas TX
